claims: The v9 case contains the hull, keel and two rudders.
The period-mean resistance is below the provided towing-test reference.
Friction and pressure are of comparable magnitude in the selected averaging window.
limits: A three-grid convergence study has not yet been completed.
The force signal remains unsteady; a single snapshot is not a valid resistance estimate.
The AI review interprets supplied evidence and does not run or replace the CFD solver.

provenance.geometry: project-created Laurons II CAD; hull + keel + two rudders
provenance.publication_scope: aggregated values and project-generated media only
